<!-- Thanks for contributing to Scalir! Please fill this out so reviews go quickly. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12. For non-trivial changes, please open an issue first. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Other (describe):

## User-visible impact

<!-- What changes for someone using the tool? "None" is a fine answer for internal changes. -->

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (the pre-existing `vitest.config.ts` error is expected — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Manually tested in `npm run dev` (for UI changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change stays **100% client-side** — no uploads, network calls, or telemetry added
- [ ] Engine changes include/adjust tests in `test/core.test.ts`
- [ ] Screenshots/clip attached for UI changes
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
